However, I would add another aspect to support my agreement - the necessity of pain control measures during the period of observation. Effective analgesia ensures comfort for the child, preventing unnecessary distress and promoting better cooperation during follow-ups. Thus, while agreeing with maintaining regular clinical checks, incorporating short-term relief strategies could enhance overall patient care.
